message:
🌱 Add the-update-framework-tuf-: Modernise and rationalise packaging mission (#747)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "the-update-framework-tuf-1161-modernise-and-rationalise-packaging",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "the-update-framework-tuf-: Modernise and rationalise packaging",
+    "description": "Modernise and rationalise packaging. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current the-update-framework-tuf- deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your the-update-framework-tuf- version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n the-update-framework-tuf- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=the-update-framework-tuf-\nhelm list -n the-update-framework-tuf- 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working the-update-framework-tuf- installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review the-update-framework-tuf- configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant the-update-framework-tuf- configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n the-update-framework-tuf- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=the-update-framework-tuf-\nkubectl get configmap -n the-update-framework-tuf- -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=the-update-framework-tuf-\n```\n**Description of issue or feature request**:\n\nPython packaging has changed significantly since the tuf packaging was created."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Modernise and rationalise packaging",
+        "description": "This is a WIP  trying to identify whether splitting the client and repository code and maintaining a client as\na separate installation (in a client branch for now) will be useful for client side users of tuf (e.g. pip) as well as for providing some kind of support for older versions.\n\nUp to now I\n```yaml\npip install -e ../vendoring\nERROR: File \"setup.py\" not found. Directory cannot be installed in editable mode: /home/jku/src/vendoring\n(A \"pyproject.toml\" file was found, but editable mode currently requires a setup.py based build.)\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade the-update-framework-tuf- to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade the-update-framework-tuf-:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade the-update-framework-tuf- the-update-framework-tuf-/the-update-framework-tuf- --namespace the-update-framework-tuf-\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n the-update-framework-tuf-\nhelm list -n the-update-framework-tuf-\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n the-update-framework-tuf- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=the-update-framework-tuf-\nkubectl get events -n the-update-framework-tuf- --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Modernise and rationalise packaging\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This is a WIP  trying to identify whether splitting the client and repository code and maintaining a client as\na separate installation (in a client branch for now) will be useful for client side users of tuf (e.g. pip) as well as for providing some kind of support for older versions.\n\nUp to now I have only removed the pure repository code and generated a tuf-client distribution.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "pip install -e ../vendoring\nERROR: File \"setup.py\" not found. Directory cannot be installed in editable mode: /home/jku/src/vendoring\n(A \"pyproject.toml\" file was found, but editable mode currently requires a setup.py based build.)",
+        "import setuptools\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    setuptools.setup()"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "the-update-framework-tuf-",
+      "graduated",
+      "security",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "the-update-framework-tuf-"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/theupdateframework/python-tuf/issues/1161",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/theupdateframework/python-tuf",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/theupdateframework/python-tuf/pull/1221"
+    },
+    "reactions": 4,
+    "comments": 11,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with the-update-framework-tuf- installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:19:32.701Z",
